name: add_to_power_rail
short_description: Add power sources to power Rail
full_help:
add_to_power_rail

Description: 
Add power sources to power Rail

Syntax: 
add_to_power_rail  [-power_sources <args>] [-phased_power_source <args>]
                   [-quiet] [-verbose] <power_rail>

Usage: 
  Name                    Description
  -----------------------------------
  [-power_sources]        List of power_sources to add. Can be power rails 
                          and/or power supplies
  [-phased_power_source]  Pair of phased power source and its phase value. 
                          Power source can be a phased power rail.
  [-quiet]                Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]              Suspend message limits during command execution
  <power_rail>            Power rail to add sources to

Categories: 
XDC, Floorplan
